requirement_topic.en: EFL Grid Connection - 240/415 V, 50 Hz and Project Acceptance
requirement_topic.zh: EFL电网接入——240/415 V、50 Hz及项目验收
requirement_topic.zht: EFL電網接入——240/415 V、50 Hz及項目驗收

summary.en: Fiji's low-voltage supply is commonly 240 V single-phase / 415 V three-phase at 50 Hz. Energy Fiji Limited (EFL) is the main electricity utility and project gate for grid-connected loads, including public or fleet EV charging sites. EV charger projects should be checked for available supply capacity, metering, protection coordination, earthing, voltage drop, harmonic injection, load management, and commissioning evidence. Fiji has the same 50 Hz frequency as China, but the 240/415 V nominal voltage differs from China's 220/380 V baseline and must be covered by the charger rating and protection settings.
summary.zh: 斐济低压供电通常为240 V单相 / 415 V三相、50 Hz。Energy Fiji Limited（EFL）是主要电力公用事业机构，也是公共或车队电动汽车充电站等并网负载的项目关口。电动汽车充电项目应核查可用供电容量、计量、保护配合、接地、电压降、谐波注入、负载管理和调试证据。50 Hz频率与中国相同，但240/415 V标称电压不同于中国220/380 V基线，必须由充电桩额定值和保护设置覆盖。
summary.zht: 斐濟低壓供電通常為240 V單相 / 415 V三相、50 Hz。Energy Fiji Limited（EFL）是主要電力公用事業機構，也是公共或車隊電動汽車充電站等併網負載的項目關口。電動汽車充電項目應核查可用供電容量、計量、保護配合、接地、電壓降、諧波注入、負載管理和調試證據。50 Hz頻率與中國相同，但240/415 V標稱電壓不同於中國220/380 V基線，必須由充電樁額定值和保護設置覆蓋。

standards_or_laws: Energy Fiji Limited (EFL) service and connection requirements
Fiji Electricity Act and electricity supply rules where applicable
IEC 61000 series - electromagnetic compatibility and power quality
IEC 61851-1 - EV conductive charging system general requirements

summary.en: China domestic charger installations are commonly documented against GB/T 18487.1-2023, GB/T 20234 connectors, GB/T 27930-2023 communication for DC systems, and local grid-operator acceptance. China domestic supply is 220 V single-phase / 380 V three-phase at 50 Hz. Fiji has the same 50 Hz frequency as China but a different nominal voltage at 240/415 V, so China domestic ratings and protection settings cannot be assumed to transfer without confirmation.
summary.zh: 中国国内充电桩安装通常依据GB/T 18487.1-2023、GB/T 20234接口、直流系统GB/T 27930-2023通信及当地电网运营商验收准备文件。中国国内供电为220 V单相 / 380 V三相、50 Hz。斐济标称频率相同，但标称电压为240/415 V，与中国不同，因此不能假定中国国内额定值和保护设置无需确认即可适用。
summary.zht: 中國國內充電樁安裝通常依據GB/T 18487.1-2023、GB/T 20234接口、直流系統GB/T 27930-2023通訊及當地電網運營商驗收準備文件。中國國內供電為220 V單相 / 380 V三相、50 Hz。斐濟標稱頻率相同，但標稱電壓為240/415 V，與中國不同，因此不能假定中國國內額定值和保護設置無需確認即可適用。

standards_or_laws: China local grid operator project-acceptance requirements

gap.en: Exporters must confirm input-voltage range, over/under-voltage thresholds, breaker and RCD ratings, cable sizing, heat dissipation, and harmonic data for Fiji's 240/415 V, 50 Hz system. The frequency is not the gap; the voltage delta, EFL project acceptance, weak-grid locations, and tropical coastal conditions are the practical gaps. A China 220/380 V configuration without documented 240/415 V acceptance is not Fiji grid-ready.
gap.zh: 出口商必须确认输入电压范围、过/欠压阈值、断路器和RCD额定值、电缆选型、散热能力及谐波数据适用于斐济240/415 V、50 Hz系统。频率不是差距；电压差异、EFL项目验收、弱电网地点及热带沿海条件才是实务差距。未形成240/415 V适用文件的中国220/380 V配置不满足斐济并网准备要求。
gap.zht: 出口商必須確認輸入電壓範圍、過/欠壓閾值、斷路器和RCD額定值、電纜選型、散熱能力及諧波數據適用於斐濟240/415 V、50 Hz系統。頻率不是差距；電壓差異、EFL項目驗收、弱電網地點及熱帶沿海條件才是實務差距。未形成240/415 V適用文件的中國220/380 V配置不滿足斐濟併網準備要求。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory at project level - grid-connected charger installations require EFL connection review, electrical installation compliance, and commissioning acceptance as applicable
mandatory_status.cn: China local grid operator acceptance applies domestically and is not an EFL approval substitute; Fiji 240/415 V ratings must be documented

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Fiji uses the same 50 Hz frequency as China but a different 240/415 V nominal voltage. Treat voltage range, protection settings, EFL connection acceptance, and site commissioning as required Fiji-specific checks before shipment or installation.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 斐济与中国同为50 Hz频率，但标称电压为不同的240/415 V。出货或安装前，应将电压范围、保护设置、EFL接入验收和现场调试作为斐济专门核查项处理。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 斐濟與中國同為50 Hz頻率，但標稱電壓為不同的240/415 V。出貨或安裝前，應將電壓範圍、保護設置、EFL接入驗收和現場調試作為斐濟專門核查項處理。
